5 ?70 0110111000 5

Constant
5 C 5 1111111111 a mismatch
5 C 5n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 7
5 I 7 0010011100 4 mismatch
5 I 7n 1101100011 6 mismatch

Unary 0
5 I 0 0100100100 3 mismatch
5 I 0n 1011011011 7 mismatch

Binary 70
5 AND 70 0000000100 1 mismatch
5 AND 70n 1111111011 9 mismatch
5 OR 70 0110111100 6 mismatch
5 OR 70n 1001000011 4 mismatch
5 XOR 70 0110111000 5 match 1/1
all match XOR 70
5 XOR 70n 1001000111 5 mismatch
5 AND-NOT 70 0010011000 3 mismatch
5 AND-NOT 70n 1101100111 7 mismatch
5 OR-NOT 70 1011011111 8 mismatch

0 I 2
1 I 3

Extending defaults
5 0110111000 5
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 0010011100 partial 1011011011 7
left 7
Starting at I 1 decreasing
I 0 0100100100 partial 1101100011 6
right 6
Choosing left
5 I 7

Selected
0 I 2
1 I 3
2 I 4
3 I 5
4 I 6
5 XOR 70
6 I 1
7 I 2

Applying to 11111101
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 2 = 1
1 I 3 = 1
2 I 4 = 1
3 I 5 = 1
4 I 6 = 0
5 XOR 70 = XOR(I 7,I 0) = XOR(1,1) = 0
6 I 1 = 1
7 I 2 = 1

\boxed{11110011}
